summary: Doctor reports app-only API auth, OAuth2 user-context auth, and X Articles cookie auth as separate lanes.
reason: X accepts app-only bearer tokens for public reads but rejects them for /2/users/me, writes, bookmarks, and user-context analytics. Cookie capture for X Articles is a third auth surface and must not be presented as v2 API user-context auth.
validated_outcome: Focused tests cover doctor auth_lanes JSON and X unsupported-auth error classification.
